name: Antivirus Password Dumper Detected
description: Antivirus software has detected typical credential dumping tools such as Mimikatz, laZagne, or WCE, which can indicate an attempt to exfiltrate credentials from the system. This is a critical indicator of post-exploitation activity.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered by the antivirus on the host **{hostname}**: a potential **OS Credential Dumping** tool (**MITRE ATT&CK T1003**) was detected with the signature **{signature}** in the file **{file_name}** at the path **{file_path}**. The antivirus product is **{av_product}**. The presence of a credential dumper indicates a severe security incident where an attacker is likely attempting to steal credentials for lateral movement or privilege escalation. Immediate action is required. Isolate the host, perform a full forensic analysis to determine the initial compromise vector and the extent of the attacker's activity. The event occurred under the user **{user}**.

parameters.name: signature
parameters.description: The antivirus signature that matched the file.

parameters.name: file_name
parameters.description: The name of the file that was detected as a credential dumper.

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: The full path to the detected file.

parameters.name: av_product
parameters.description: The name of the antivirus product that generated the alert.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the file was found or accessed.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname of the server where the event occurred.
